description: These Annielo shoes from rockport are a great combination of high quality material and comfortable styling. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added  strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the hide Leather upper such that it is easy to clean and enhances shoe life Slightly stitched cap toe for added durability Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Moisture-wicking nappa lining around the collar Elongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug Fit and added ventilation Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfort Full-length phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption by reducing foot fatigue Rectangular grooves on the lateral heel, midfoot and medial forefoot for improved grip and traction on various surfaces Horse shoe pattern with scoop heel for cushioning Flex grooves for added flexibility Raised heel for a stylish look Shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
